mapper.select:
SELECT du.id, du.production_line_id, pl.line_name AS production_line_name, du.unit_code, du.unit_name, du.creator_id, su.username AS creator_name, du.created_at AS create_at, du.updated_at AS update_at FROM device_unit du LEFT JOIN production_line pl ON du.production_line_id = pl.id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON du.creator_id = su.id
AND du.production_line_id = #{productionLineId}
AND du.unit_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{unitCode}, '%')
AND du.unit_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{unitName}, '%')
ORDER BY du.id DESC
